title: Triumph (Victory-class)

{{Quote|Cease firing on ''Triumph''. We want to save the ship if we can.|Admiral Ackbar|<ref name="Wedge's Gamble" />}}
The '''''Triumph''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] serving under [[Director of Imperial Intelligence|Director]] of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]]. It was one of two ships left to defend [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]] against the impending [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] invasion. It was captured by the ''[[Mon Remonda]]'' after having received heavy damage.

==History==
The ''Triumph's'' class was never specified, but well before the battle, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] stated that approximately seven [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] were on station defending [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]]. It was also stated that both sides' Star Destroyers traded missiles during the battle, something Imperial-class Star Destroyers do not have, lending more credibility to the ship being a Victory-class Star Destroyer.

===Reputation===
Although tasked with the defense of Imperial Center, the ''Triumph'' was not known for its illustrious reputation or crew. As a result, Isard chose it to defend the planet during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Seizure of Coruscant]] along with the Star Destroyer [[Monarch (Star Destroyer)|''Monarch'']], which had a similarly unimpressive reputation.<ref name="Wedge's Gamble">''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''</ref>

Isard wanted Coruscant to fall to the Rebel hands so that the New Republic would find its [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] resources devastated by an outbreak of the [[krytos virus]]. Therefore, it is likely Isard knew the ''Triumph'' and ''Monarch'' would be either captured or destroyed during the battle. She essentially left them for dead, choosing to instead relocate the superior Star Destroyers [[Emperor's Will (Victory-class)|''Emperor's Will'']] and [[Imperator (Victory-class)|''Imperator'']].

===Capture during Coruscant battle===
Early during the battle, ''Triumph'' took heavy fire by the New Republic's Star Destroyers ''[[Emancipator]]'' and [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']], causing some of its shields to collapse. The captain executed a roll to bring undamaged shields up between the ''Triumph'' and the Rebels, but after the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] joined in the assault against it, the remaining shields failed.

On Admiral Ackbar's orders, the Mon Calamari Cruiser ''[[Mon Remonda]]'' then engaged the ''Triumph'' with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] and [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] fire, damaging it enough that [[Assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttles]] were able to safely join in directly attacking it.

Soon, the ''Triumph'' lost power and started heading slide back into the Coruscant atmosphere. Ackbar ordered ''Mon Remonda'' Captain [[Onoma]] to use his [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] to pull the ''Triumph'' along and accelerate its orbit so that it would not decay. It was then captured by the New Republic, shortly before the ''Monarch'' also surrendered.

==Behind the scenes==
A [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] named ''Triumph'' took part in an ambush of the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Rehz'nor]]'' in the game ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''. The exact time and location of the battle are unknown, but it would presumably have been before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. ''Triumph'' may be forced to withdraw by breaking through its shields, and it is possible to destroy it in the mission. If this is the same ''Triumph'', it can be surmised that the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] result of that battle was the ''Triumph'' successfully escaping to hyperspace, as well as lending to the notion that the ''Triumph'' captured was, in fact, a Victory-class Star Destroyer.
